info.title: Marker Web API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation for the Marker Web Next.js route handlers. Keep this file synchronized with src/app/api whenever endpoints change.

SessionCookie.name: marker_session
SessionCookie.description: Opaque HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict session cookie. Set by login and never exposed to JavaScript.

password.description: Optional new password. Must be at least 6 characters when provided.

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the number of seconds in Retry-After.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the current rate-limit window resets.

PayloadTooLarge.description: Request body exceeds the endpoint size limit.

post.description: Creates a user and sets an opaque HttpOnly session cookie.
Authenticates credentials and sets an opaque HttpOnly session cookie.
Authenticates a database user whose role is admin and sets the same opaque session cookie.

get.description: Admin-protected user listing with pagination and optional search.

patch.description: Updates editable user fields and optionally hashes a new password.

post.summary: Upload a user profile image as admin

image.description: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, or GIF under 5 MB.

get.description: Loads the requested profile. Authorization is optional for a target userId, but required when loading the current user.

image.description: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, or GIF under 5 MB.

post.description: Fetches multiple users by ids. This route currently does not enforce auth.

get.summary: Get tasks for current or target user

post.description: Legacy event endpoint. Current scheduling UI uses task endpoints.

200.description: Event created. Existing handler returns the success text under the error key.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: ObjectId cursor returned as nextCursor by the previous page.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: ObjectId cursor returned as nextCursor by the previous page.

media.description: When provided, replaces the existing media.

post.summary: Revoke all sessions for the current user

503.description: Configuration or MongoDB is not ready
